name: Olive Garden Apple Praline Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Red delicious apples (peeled and cored, diced 1/2 inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust: Melt butter and stir in graham cracker crumbs and sugar until thoroughly blended. Press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Set aside.
2. For the apple mixture: In a Dutch oven, melt butter over low heat, add brown sugar, apples, cinnamon, nutmeg, and allspice. Simmer over low heat until apples are soft but still hold their shape. Cool mixture to room temperature and reserve.
3. For the praline topping: In a small bowl, mix dark brown sugar, softened butter, and pecan pieces with a fork until well incorporated. Reserve.
4. For the cheesecake filling: In a large bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed, cream together sugar and cream cheese until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs one at a time until smooth. Add heavy whipping cream and continue beating until the mixture is thick and creamy. Gently stir in the cooled apple mixture by hand.
5. Pour the cheesecake filling into the prepared springform pan and spread the praline topping over the top.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes. Allow to cool to room temperature before removing the sides of the pan. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Garnish with whipped cream.
Source: The Olive Garden. Recipe by [original source].
